name: feat-message
input: the staging area adds a user login feature: new file src/auth/login.ts implementing the login form and input validation

expect.rubric: The output is a Conventional Commits message: subject is <type>(scope): <imperative>, ≤72 characters, with a type that matches the change (here it should be feat); describes only this one logical change without restating the diff line by line; and provides a runnable git commit command.
